evidence_quotes.quote: the removal of access to a purchased product
Should online support come to an end there should be an update, allowing the consumer to enjoy their product offline.

paragraphs.text: Considering the monetary and emotional loss, it is regarded a grossly Nefarious act, when game studioes cease their support to games that have been bought and paid for. The consumer market calls for an obvious distinction between an item bought, and an item leased. It is therefore absolutely imperative to protect consumers from game Studios, Publishers and creators in regards to the removal of access to a purchased product Should online support come to an end there should be an update, allowing the consumer to enjoy their product offline.
